message:
test(fcp-e2e): assert denial carries operation name (browser) + update figma op count to 19

Two small, test-only adjustments.

browser_compliance_e2e: in the
`browser_dangerous_operations_require_approval_tokens` test, the
`CapabilityDenied { capability, reason }` arm asserts on
`capability` equalling the operation being invoked (the connector
stamps the operation name into the denial, not the post-resolution
capability id, so the prior `expected_capability` rename map produced
assertion failures). Switches the RHS to the local `operation` binding
that already carries the raw op name.

figma_compliance_e2e: the manifest grew two new operations since the
count was last pinned, so `figma_operation_risk_levels_properly_gated`
bumps the expected total from `17` to `19` and updates the assertion
message to match ("Figma manifest should have 19 operations").

No other files and no production surface touched.
